step_rationale: VSMC behavior and atherosclerosis; integrin signaling in endothelial/plaque remodeling.
mechanism: BCAR1 regulates vascular smooth muscle cell adhesion and endothelial function in atherosclerotic plaque development.

references.title: Integrative functional genomics analysis identifies pleiotropic genes for vascular diseases.
A genomic exploration identifies mechanisms that may explain adverse cardiovascular effects of COX-2 inhibitors.
